name: ShellBags — Folder Navigation History
categoryDescription: User behavior artifacts — browsing history, recently accessed files, search terms, and folder navigation.
description: Records every folder the user opened in Explorer — even on removed drives or deleted directories. Stored across NTUSER.DAT and USRCLASS.DAT.
forensic_value: Proves folder access even after file deletion or device removal. Especially valuable for removable media and deleted evidence folders. Parse with SBECmd for full output.
